user.title: Location and search radius
user.description: Set the reference point and the radius to search for fuel stations.

fuel_types.title: Fuel types
fuel_types.description: Select the fuel types you want to monitor.

advanced.title: Advanced settings
advanced.description:
Configure the ranking size, update interval, and optional AI for trend analysis.

{token_summary}

data_description.top_n: Does not affect statistics: average and cheapest price always use all stations within the configured radius.
data_description.ai_model: Recommended: gpt-4.1-mini (2.5M free token/day group). Lower free quota: gpt-4.1, gpt-4o, gpt-5. Claude: no free tier (pay-per-token).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the MIMIT server. Please check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: An integration for this location is already configured.

data_description.top_n: Does not affect statistics: average and cheapest price always use all stations within the configured radius.
data_description.ai_model: Recommended: gpt-4.1-mini (2.5M free token/day group). Lower free quota: gpt-4.1, gpt-4o, gpt-5. Claude: no free tier (pay-per-token).

stations.title: Fuel types to monitor
stations.description: Choose which fuel types you care about. This applies to both ranking sensors and the favourite station picker.

stations_picker.title: Favourite stations
stations_picker.description: Select which stations to monitor. Sensors are created for every fuel type chosen in the previous step. Found {station_count} stations within the configured radius.{no_data_hint}

data_description.favorite_stations: One row = one station. Sensors are created automatically for each configured fuel type.

force_refresh.name: Refresh now
force_refresh.description: Forces an immediate refresh of fuel prices.

entry_id.name: Integration ID
entry_id.description: ID of the config entry to refresh. If omitted, refreshes all Carburanti MIMIT entries.

get_cheapest_near.name: Find cheapest stations near
get_cheapest_near.description: Returns the cheapest fuel stations for a given fuel type near an arbitrary location.

fuel_type.name: Fuel type
fuel_type.description: The type of fuel to search for.

top_n.name: Number of results
top_n.description: Maximum number of stations to return.

clear_history.name: Clear price history
clear_history.description: Clears the local price history for a config entry.

entry_id.name: Integration ID
entry_id.description: ID of the config entry whose history should be cleared.

fuel_type.name: Fuel type
fuel_type.description: Fuel type to clear (optional; clears all types if omitted).
